name: context-budget-audit
description: Audit and prune per-session context waste — MCP servers, plugins, skills, subagents. Triggers: 'what's eating my context', 'trim my agent setup'.

metadata.catalog_summary: Audit the per-session token cost of your local agent setup — idle MCP servers, unused plugins, skills, slash commands, and subagents. A read-only engine estimates each surface's always-on cost, checks recent transcripts for real usage, and shows what is safe to prune, biggest wins first. Removal is gated behind confirmation; MCP and plugin config edits are handed back as commands, never executed.
